title: Full Style Preview + Complete Repo Saves
summary: The Style tab live preview now reflects every decoration in real-time. All color, glow, outline, effect, geometry, badge and rank fields are persisted to appearance.json on save. Three new UI sections added.
changes: Added module-level _renderStylePreview() — full preview renderer covering all Tier 1+2 fields (ring, avatar geometry/outline/glow, name color/glow/outline/highlight, status emoji, bubble bg/outline/glow/effect, badge/rank chips)
Replaced stub inner _renderPreview() with a single delegate call to _renderStylePreview()

Extended _styleDraftBase initialization to include all 16 Tier 2 color/style fields (nameGlowColor, nameGlowPreset, nameOutlineStyle, nameOutlineColor, nameHighlightColor, bubbleOutlineColor, bubbleGlowColor, bubbleGlowPreset, bubbleEffect, profileGeometry, profileOutlineColor, profileGlowColor, badge, badgeTint, rankLabel, rankColor) read from appearance.json
Extended _hasDraftChanges() to check all 29 style fields instead of the previous 5 — thickness and color/style changes now correctly mark unsaved state
Extended _commitDraft() _t2Fields array from 8 to 24 fields — all color/style Tier 2 values are now written to appearance.json on Save
Added loadNameDecoSection(uid): Name Glow Color + preset (Off/Soft/Strong/Halo/Bloom), Name Outline Color + style (Off/Solid/Double), Name Highlight BG color pickers
Added loadBubbleDecoSection(uid): Bubble Outline Color, Bubble Glow Color + preset (Off/Soft/Strong), Bubble Effect picker (None/Shimmer/Sparkle/Ripple/Breathe/Holographic)

Added loadProfileDecoSection(uid): Profile Shape picker (Circle/Squircle/Rounded/Hexagon/Diamond), Profile Outline Color, Profile Glow Color, Badge picker from BADGE_REGISTRY, Badge Tint Color, Rank Label input (max 16 chars), Rank Text Color
Added 3 HTML section containers: styleNameDecoSection, styleBubbleDecoSection, styleProfileDecoSection — inserted between thickness controls and the draft bar
All three new sections wire directly to _styleDraft and call _renderStylePreview() on every change for instant live feedback
